name: analyzeOfflineHeapRetention
description:
Offline mode: analyze an existing local .hprof for retention-oriented evidence and return structured JSON plus Markdown.
中文：离线分析已有本地 .hprof，产出 holder/引用链/GC root 方向的 retention 证据与 Markdown 摘要。
This tool focuses on suspected holders, representative reference chains, and GC-root hints; it is separate from summarizeOfflineHeapDumpFile, which only provides a shallow-by-class summary.
retainedBytesApprox is populated only when the analyzer can defend that retained-style interpretation; otherwise it may be null and reachableSubgraphBytesApprox is only an approximate ranking hint.

heapDumpAbsolutePath.description: Absolute path to an existing .hprof file on the host.

topObjectLimit.description: Maximum number of holder / chain rows to include in the retention result.

maxOutputChars.description: Maximum Markdown characters to return in the retention summary.

analysisDepth.description: Analysis depth hint: fast, balanced, or deep.

focusTypes.description: Optional terminal types to prioritize, such as byte[] or java.lang.String[].

focusPackages.description: Optional business package prefixes used to prioritize candidates before bounded truncation; not a hard filter.
